title: any opinion on use AI for vibe coding as a newbie
text: How to learn javascript and typescript programing DSA in current day and age without use AI cheat code and can any one tech me as mentor that would be helpful, I'm always getting jammed around when hard coding javascript syntaxes but i know how im going to solve the problem but still my brain get fogged out. thank you in advance.
